g.onclick: sendPrompt('Help me generate a consistent AI face for Carmelo Reyes')
sendPrompt('How do I train a LoRA model for a consistent AI face?')
sendPrompt('What kind of images should I generate for Carmelo Reyes content bank?')
sendPrompt('Help me write Carmelo Reyes social media bios for Instagram and TikTok')
sendPrompt('The backstory bible is already done — what else do I need for Carmelo personality docs?')
sendPrompt('Help me set up email for Carmelo Reyes newsletter and verification')
sendPrompt('Help me build the LLM content generation system for Carmelo using the Anthropic API')
sendPrompt('How should I pair AI-generated images with captions for social media?')
sendPrompt('What tools should I use for scheduling posts to Instagram and TikTok automatically?')
sendPrompt('Help me plan the carmeloreyes.com website build with Next.js')
sendPrompt('Help me set up email automation sequences for Carmelo Reyes')
sendPrompt('Help me write the free lesson content for Carmelo Reyes lead magnet')
sendPrompt('What should I look for when reviewing AI-generated content before posting?')
sendPrompt('What metrics should I track for Carmelo Reyes social media growth?')
sendPrompt('Help me set up full automation for Carmelo Reyes content pipeline')

svg.text: Generate Carmelo's base face (20-30 variations → pick the one)
Train LoRA on chosen face (15-20 training images, multiple angles)
Generate 50-100 lifestyle images (Miami, gym, tech, food, travel)
Create Instagram account (@carmeloreyes) — bio, profile pic, grid
Create TikTok account (@carmeloreyes) — bio, profile pic
Set up email address for Carmelo (newsletter + account verification)
Build content gen system (Anthropic API + Carmelo system prompt)
Set up social scheduling tool (Buffer / Make.com / n8n)
Build carmeloreyes.com (homepage, blog, course, email capture)
Set up email automation (welcome sequence + weekly newsletter)
Start posting (semi-auto — review before publish, 2-3 weeks)
Monitor analytics, tweak content style and posting times
Generate first batch of blog posts (5-10 SEO articles)
Switch to full automation — remove manual review step
Set up recurring Cowork tasks for weekly content batches
Sit back and watch the numbers 📈
